top_signals.title: ECB announces main milestones for roll-out of Integrated Reporting Framework
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gulf recalibrates as Iran emerges intact from war - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Gulf recalibrates as Iran emerges intact from war  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cyberattack on Russian tech firm Astral disrupts business, government services for week
top_signals.summary: According to customer complaints, the disruption affected a range of services used by businesses, leading to interruptions in cash register operations, difficulties selling certain regulated goods, loss of access to customer portals and corporate email and problems with electronic human resources document management systems and authentication using digital certificates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Centene to offer buyouts to some employees as health insurer cuts costs
top_signals.summary: The health insurer Centene did not indicate to how many employees were offered buyouts or how much it is aiming to reduce its workforce.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Petra Diamonds cuts put nearly 1,800 jobs at risk, union says
top_signals.summary: South Africa's largest mining union says workers are unfairly blamed for industry pressures amid Petra's Finsch and Cullinan restructuring.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Surge Copper prefeasibility more than doubles Berg project value
top_signals.summary: The PFS gave the project an after-tax net present value (at 8% discount) of C$4.6 billion, with an internal rate of return of 24%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Rinehart’s $1B SpaceX bet targets mining beyond Earth
top_signals.summary: Australia’s richest person Gina Rinehart sees potential ties between its critical minerals portfolio and Elon Musk’s space venture as demand grows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
